# Monobin

> One binary. SSR + islands. Zero-ops deploy. A standard-library Go framework: file-based routing, server-side loaders, Preact islands, Tailwind v4 — shipped as a single `//go:embed` binary. Pull the real signatures from the source below instead of guessing.

## Source (Go core, stdlib only)
- [framework/app.go](framework/app.go): App, file-based router, dynamic-route matching, fillPattern
- [framework/render.go](framework/render.go): SSR pipeline; `island` + `dict`/`scripts`/`styles` template funcs; conditional zero-JS
- [framework/server.go](framework/server.go): http.Handler, middleware chain wiring, /assets, dev live-reload (SSE)
- [framework/build.go](framework/build.go): BuildStatic (SSG), StaticPaths expansion, ErrNotFound skip, output-dir guard
- [framework/middleware.go](framework/middleware.go): Middleware, App.Use, RoutePattern, App.NoStatic
- [framework/introspect.go](framework/introspect.go): App.RouteInfo, App.Check (power `monobin routes` / `check`)
- [framework/loaders.go](framework/loaders.go): example loaders + StaticPaths (Loader, Ctx, ErrNotFound)

## Client + recipes
- [islands/src/entry.js](islands/src/entry.js): island registry + hydration loop
- [islands/src/counter.jsx](islands/src/counter.jsx): example island
- [islands/src/style.css](islands/src/style.css): Tailwind `@import` + `@source "../../app"`
- [examples/auth/auth.go](examples/auth/auth.go): cookie-session auth middleware (SSR-only recipe)

## Docs
- [README.md](README.md): thesis, why-not-Next.js, architecture, quickstart
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): commands, gotchas, boundaries for editing this repo
- [skill/SKILL.md](skill/SKILL.md): how to build a site with Monobin
